zh.lifeSummary: 當William Bradley於1635年出生在美國堪薩斯州薩姆納倫敦時，他的父親Robert Bradley18歲，母親Ann Dun9歲。他於1669年7月29日與Sarah Boswell在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 基路士 維特 可利普萊加特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1700年享年65歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 波托爾福也斯 邱奇 阿爾蓋特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Bradley于1635年出生在美国堪萨斯州薩姆納倫敦时，他的父亲Robert Bradley18岁，母亲Ann Dun9岁。他于1669年7月29日与Sarah Boswell在英国英格兰倫敦聖 基路士 維特 可利普萊加特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1700年享年65岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦聖 波托爾福也斯 邱奇 阿爾蓋特。

nameMeanings.name: Bradley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places throughout England named Bradley, from Old English brād ‘broad’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Scottish: habitational name from Braidlie in Roxburghshire.
Irish (Ulster): adopted as an English equivalent of Gaelic Ó Brolcháin ‘descendant of Brolacháin’, a diminutive of the personal name Brólach, compare Brawley . This was a learned family.

variants.name: Brawley
meanings: Irish (Derry): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Brólaigh ‘descendant of Brolach’, a personal name possibly derived from brollach ‘breast’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Bradley was born in 1635, in London, Sumner, Kansas, United States, his father, Robert Bradley, was 18 and his mother, Ann Dun, was 9. He married Sarah Boswell on 29 July 1669, in St Giles without Cripplegate, London, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1700, at the age of 65, and was buried in Saint Botolph's Church Aldgate, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Bradley est né en 1635, à London, Sumner, Kansas, États-Unis, son père, Robert Bradley, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Ann Dun, avait 9 ans. Il a épousé Sarah Boswell le 29 juillet 1669, à St Giles without Cripplegate, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1700, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Saint Botolph's Church Aldgate, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Bradley è nato il nel 1635 nel London, Sumner, Kansas, Stati Uniti d'America, il suo padre, Robert Bradley, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Ann Dun, aveva 9 anni. Lui sposato Sarah Boswell il 29 luglio 1669, nel St Giles without Cripplegate, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1700, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Saint Botolph's Church Aldgate, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Bradleyが1635年にアメリカ合衆国カンザス州スムナーロンドンで生まれた時，父Robert Bradleyは18歳，母Ann Dunは9歳であった。1669年7月29日にイギリスイギリスロンドンスト ギレス ウィソウト クリップレガトでSarah Boswellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1700年に65歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンサイント ボトルフ'ス チャーチ アルドガトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Bradley(이)가 1635년 미국 캔자스 주 섬너 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Bradley(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Ann Dun(은)는 9세였다. 그는 1669년 7월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 자일스 위토우트 크리플레가트에서 Sarah Boswell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1700년 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 세인트 벗프'스 c후르치 알드가트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Bradley nasceu em 1635, em London, Sumner, Cansas, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Robert Bradley, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Ann Dun, tinha 9 anos. Ele casou-se com Sarah Boswell em 29 de julho de 1669, em St Giles without Cripplegate, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1700, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Saint Botolph's Church Aldgate, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St Giles Cripplegate, London, London, En: ст джилесь витоут крипплегэит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Bradley родился в 1635 г. в местности лондон, сумнир, Канзас, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени Robert Bradley было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Ann Dun, 9. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Boswell 29 июля 1669 г. в местности ст джилесь витоут крипплегэит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1700 г. в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности сеинт ботолф'с чурч алджэит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Bradley nació en 1635, en London, Sumner, Kansas, Estados Unidos, su papá, Robert Bradley, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Ann Dun, tenía 9 años. Se casó con Sarah Boswell el 29 de julio de 1669, en St Giles without Cripplegate, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1700, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Saint Botolph's Church Aldgate, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
